issue.title: InlineFunction should handle nofpclass in AddParamAndFnBasicAttributes
issue.body:
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/7c4009f21b877769a5d3cd5c4d0bd0fb75c9c588/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/InlineFunction.cpp#L1367

This should propagate like these other attributes
issue.author: arsenm
